stories.headline: How the US can blockade the Strait of Hormuz
stories.summary: US forces will be ready to descend from helicopters on to oil tankers

stories.headline: How many ships are crossing the Strait of Hormuz?
stories.summary: Four vessels with links to Iran have crossed the Strait of Hormuz despite the start of a US naval blockade, but two of those vessels appear to have reversed course.

stories.headline: Asian Stocks to Track US Rally on Iran Peace Push: Markets Wrap

stories.headline: Daiichi Life to Tighten Private Credit Manager Selection on Risk
stories.summary: Daiichi Life Group Inc. is tightening the process for selecting managers of private credit investments to decrease risk after several high-profile defaults overseas.

stories.headline: Lagarde Says Europe’s Economy Has Slipped Below ECB Baseline

stories.headline: Traders Target Bond Market Rally on Iran War ‘Tone Change’
stories.summary: Optimism about a possible peace deal in the Middle East and lower oil prices has bond traders positioning for gains in Treasuries that could send 10-year yields sliding toward 4%.

stories.headline: Dollar and VIX Back in Tandem as Iran War Usurps Tariff Bets
stories.summary: The dollar’s traditional relationship with equity market volatility has been revived by the war in Iran, a signal that haven-seeking investors are finding safety in the US assets they snubbed after last year’s tariff turmoil.

stories.headline: Resignations of Eric Swalwell and Tony Gonzales Set Up Special Election Fights in Texas and California
stories.summary: Aides to Greg Abbott and Gavin Newsom were weighing whether to call quick elections to replace two House members accused of sexual misconduct.

stories.headline: A New Accuser Says Eric Swalwell Sexually Assaulted Her
stories.summary: The woman said Mr. Swalwell, who resigned from Congress on Tuesday afternoon, raped her in a West Hollywood hotel room in 2018. She said she believed she was drugged.

stories.headline: Trump Administration Accuses Biden DOJ of Unfairly Prosecuting Anti-Abortion Activists
stories.summary: The report is part of the president’s effort to claim anti-conservative and anti-Christian biases in federal law enforcement, even as he pushes to wield the legal system against his political enemies.

stories.headline: EU auditors question new fund backed by EU carbon border tax for polluting industries

stories.headline: Oldest gorilla in captivity celebrates 69th birthday in Berlin Zoo
stories.summary: Arriving in Berlin in 1959, the western lowland gorilla has far outlived the typical 35-40 year wild lifespan through specialised care.

stories.headline: Israel steps up strikes on Lebanon and Hezbollah attacks continue as talks loom

stories.headline: As Iran war drags on, midterm forecasts for Republicans get even worse

stories.headline: Eric Swalwell to resign from Congress after sexual misconduct claims

stories.headline: The US blockade of Iran is a gamble. Will it work?
